_finding: SURVIVE-THE-DELETE splitter arm (4048 minimal): the unstage-born handle's RHS delete does NOT cancel the queued observer act — oracle fires ROBS('tgt') post-delete (engine misses exactly that firing; finals identical). With a1/b2 pins the law ORIGIN-keyed.
